features.name: parameterized shift with signed shift amount
features.description: Code should include a parameterized shift operation where the shift amount can be signed and the direction changes based on the sign of the shift amount
features.snippet: generate if (B_SIGNED) begin:BLOCK1 assign Y = $signed(B) < 0 ? A << -B : A >> B; end else begin:BLOCK2 assign Y = A >> B; end endgenerate

features.name: signed to unsigned conversion in shift operations
features.description: Code should include a shift operation with $signed() conversion of the shift amount for conditional direction selection
